title: Duplicating items
excerpt: Instead of duplicating items and adding them to the same area they are in with (copy) next to it, can you make similar functionality to move to where it pops up and asks where you want to move the items? So it would say …

posts.author: KB11 (Kristina Burgess)
posts.cookedHtml:
Instead of duplicating items and adding them to the same area they are in with (copy) next to it, can you make similar functionality to move to where it pops up and asks where you want to move the items? So it would say something like Duplicate to Group or Duplicate to item or Duplicate to Board depending if you want to duplicate items or subitems and you get to chose where it goes to? I have to delete the (copy) from all the items I am duplicating every time and it is not very efficient…

image1103×280 47.5 KB

posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks! I couldn’t add an image to my feature request is there any way to get it added?

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @KB11 ,

You can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

It allows you to add the same item to multiple boards and keep them in sync.

What You Can Do -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for a FREE DEMO!

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
KB11:

Instead of duplicating items and adding them to the same area they are in with (copy) next to it, can you make similar functionality to move to where it pops up and asks where you want to move the items? So it would say something like Duplicate to Group or Duplicate to item or Duplicate to Board depending if you want to duplicate items or subitems and you get to chose where it goes to? I have to delete the (copy) from all the items I am duplicating every time and it is not very efficient…

Hi! Thank you for sharing your feedback!

Our Recurring Tasks feature includes creation by group, which helps greatly with this issue. With our app, you can duplicate items directly in the group you choose without the text ‘copy’ next to the name.

Screenshot 2025-11-19 at 10.15.271560×1444 171 KB
